title: デビュー戦の後に・1本の電話

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo returns from her debut race exhausted
and out of breath, but overjoyed to now be able
to race professionally.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mood is soon dampened when she receives a
phone call from her disapproving mother. Judging
by the tense conversation, it's clear a deep
discord rests between them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her mother's words do not sway King's resolve
to prove her wrong. Determined, she declares her
intent to win the G1 Hopeful Stakes.
